create.title: Create user
create.password_hint: Leave blank to auto-generate a secure password.
create.send_reset_email_hint: Sends a password reset link to the user (recommended).

deactivate.title: Deactivate this user?
deactivate.description: This will block sign-in for this account until it is reactivated.

delete.title: Delete this user permanently?
delete.description: This will permanently remove the account only if it is an orphan user (no school memberships and no school profile).

purge.title: Delete user
purge.description: This is a permanent action. Type the confirmation text exactly to proceed.

errors.reset_email_not_sent: User created, but reset email was not sent (email not configured).

user_details.title: User details

audit_logs.title: Audit logs
audit_logs.subtitle: Immutable record of Super Admin actions.

registration_link.dialog_description: Generates a single-use link that expires in 24 hours. The school admin uses it to set their password and create the school workspace.
registration_link.slug_hint: Leave blank to auto-generate from the school name
registration_link.admin_email_hint: This email will become the school admin login.
registration_link.generated_desc: This link expires in 24 hours and can be used once.

e_registration_billing.card_body: School-level billing configuration belongs in the School Admin portal. This view is reserved for platform-wide reporting and policy controls.

hero.title: Welcome to ADMIPAEDIA
hero.subtitle: The comprehensive school management system designed to streamline administrative tasks, enhance communication, and improve educational outcomes.

student_management.title: Student Management
student_management.description: Track student information, attendance, and academic performance with ease.

teacher_portal.title: Teacher Portal
teacher_portal.description: Empower teachers with tools to manage classes, assignments, and grades.

admin_dashboard.title: Administrative Dashboard
admin_dashboard.description: Get a comprehensive overview of your institution with powerful analytics.

about.title: About ADMIPAEDIA
about.p1: ADMIPAEDIA is a comprehensive school management system designed to streamline administrative tasks, enhance communication between teachers, students, and parents, and improve educational outcomes.
about.p2: Our platform provides powerful tools for managing student information, tracking academic performance, scheduling classes, and much more. With ADMIPAEDIA, educational institutions can focus more on teaching and less on administrative overhead.

get_in_touch.title: Get in Touch
get_in_touch.body: Have questions about ADMIPAEDIA? Our team is here to help. Reach out to us and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

demo.title: Request a Demo
demo.body: Want to see ADMIPAEDIA in action? Schedule a demo with one of our product specialists.
